justification: The diff correctly migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and Mockito 5, replacing deprecated annotations (@RunWith, @Before) with modern equivalents (@ExtendWith, @BeforeEach implied by removal of setup). It also updates Spring Security configuration to use the lambda DSL and replaces deprecated javax.* packages with jakarta.*. However, the pom.xml adds a redundant junit 4 dependency alongside junit-jupiter, and the test class still uses Mockito.any() instead of the more specific matchers, which is a minor style issue but not a critical flaw.
